title: Nexus OutlinePatchStructureRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/works/{work_id}/outline/patch (V1.72). Mutates the Work outline structure: move a chapter between volumes, attach a chapter to a volume, or link an event to a chapter.

work_id.description: Work identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

base_revision.description: Revision observed by the client on the last canonical read.

chapter_id.description: Target chapter number for move_chapter or attach_to_volume.

volume_id.description: Destination volume for move_chapter or attach_to_volume.

target_chapter_id.description: Chapter that the event realizes for link_event.
